title: Tier 0-4 Run Summary
description: Top-level summary of a Tier 0-4 pipeline run, aggregating per-tier status against project-defined acceptance criteria (not ISO 9283 certification).

preset.description: Experiment preset used for this run (e.g. 'smoke' or 'full'), per configs/experiment_presets.json.

tiers.description: Per-tier summary status, keyed by tier name.

tier_summary.description: Summary status for a single tier.

status.description: Outcome of this tier against project acceptance criteria.

sample_count.description: Number of samples, waypoints, or trials evaluated in this tier.

notes.description: Optional free-text notes about this tier's run.
